column1:
Always prioritize clinic flow if unsure of what to do.

If a doctor has called off, then prioritize calling patients after clinic flow

If help is needed the responsibility is on the person needing help to ask directly, in person, and verify that your request was heard. 

If there is a single PSR, then Roomer should check patient out and schedule necessary follow up

Definitions:
Rooming: implies everything from the beginning of rooming till the patient is leaving for checkout and nurse visits.
